name: omegatoolcorp.com
message: Omega Tool Corp. is a global leader in engineering, manufacturing, and production, specializing in advanced plastics tooling solutions for over 40 years. They provide services such as mold making, machining, validation, and production molding, focusing on precision and creative design. Their intended clients include industries such as automotive, heavy truck and agricultural, consumer products, and construction. The company is known for its high-energy culture and commitment to results. Employees: 500 Revenue: $29.2 Million Industry: Industrial Machinery & Equipment    Phone Number: +52 4421615885
